title: Neuroplasticity & Learning

analysis.object: T237: Neuroplasticity and learning depth analysis

hebbian_learning.description: Δw ∝ x_pre · x_post (neurons that fire together, wire together)

synaptic_pruning.description: Pruning follows power law: N(t) ~ t^{-α}

brain_oscillations.reason: sin(2πft) — explicit EML-3 oscillation at each band

long_term_potentiation.description: LTP: exponential strengthening with repeated activation
long_term_potentiation.reason: AMPA receptor insertion: exponential in stimulation count

insight.description: Aha moment: discontinuous jump to solution
insight.reason: Non-analytic jump — TYPE1 depth change, but appears as EML-∞ event

motor_learning.description: Power law of practice: T(n) = an^{-b}

analysis.developmental_traversal: Is learning a traversal of the hierarchy? YES. Child cognitive development: EML-0 (sensorimotor, object permanence — discrete categories), EML-1 (preoperational, symbolic exponential thinking), EML-2 (concrete operations, logarithmic measurement, conservation), EML-3 (formal operations, abstract oscillatory reasoning). Piaget's 4 stages = 4 depth levels of EML. This is not metaphor — it is the same mathematical structure.

analysis.verdict: Learning: Hebbian EML-1. Brain waves: EML-3. Piaget stages = EML depth hierarchy.
analysis.theorem: T237: Neuroplasticity Depth — Piaget stages = EML levels; brain waves = EML-3

key_theorem: T237: Neuroplasticity Depth (S516). Piaget's 4 cognitive stages = exactly the 4 EML finite depth levels. Brain oscillations: EML-3. Forgetting curve: EML-1. Insight: EML-∞ event. Child development = literal depth hierarchy traversal 0→1→2→3.
rabbit_hole_log: T237: Piaget stages = EML depth levels (exact correspondence)
